mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user WHERE role_id = 3 AND deleted = 0) AS totalStudents, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM course WHERE deleted = 0) AS totalCourses, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM course_enroll WHERE deleted = 0) AS totalEnrollments, (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(study_duration), 0) FROM study_record WHERE deleted = 0) AS totalStudySeconds, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM exam_record WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 2) AS totalExamRecords, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM consult_record WHERE deleted = 0) AS totalConsults
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT student_id) FROM study_record WHERE deleted = 0 AND update_time >= CURDATE() AND update_time < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM course c WHERE c.deleted = 0
AND c.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')

SELECT u.org_name AS orgName, COUNT(DISTINCT u.id) AS studentCount, ROUND(IFNULL(SUM(sr.study_duration), 0) / 3600.0, 2) AS totalStudyHours, ROUND( CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT u.id) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE IFNULL(SUM(sr.study_duration), 0) / 3600.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT u.id) END, 2 ) AS avgStudyHours, ROUND( CASE WHEN COUNT(er.id) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE SUM(CASE WHEN er.score >= e.pass_score THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(er.id) END, 2 ) AS examPassRate FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN study_record sr ON sr.student_id = u.id AND sr.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN exam_record er ON er.student_id = u.id AND er.deleted = 0 AND er.status = 2 LEFT JOIN exam e ON e.id = er.exam_id WHERE u.role_id = 3 AND u.deleted = 0 AND u.org_name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY u.org_name ORDER BY totalStudyHours DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT org_name) FROM sys_user WHERE role_id = 3 AND deleted = 0 AND org_name IS NOT NULL

SELECT
DATE_FORMAT(update_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS label
CONCAT(YEAR(update_time), '-W', LPAD(WEEK(update_time, 0), 2, '0')) AS label
DATE_FORMAT(update_time, '%Y-%m') AS label
, ROUND(IFNULL(SUM(study_duration), 0) / 3600.0, 2) AS studyHours, COUNT(DISTINCT student_id) AS activeStudents, 0 AS newEnrollments FROM study_record WHERE deleted = 0
AND update_time >= #{fromDate}
GROUP BY label ORDER BY label

SELECT u.id AS studentId, u.real_name AS realName, u.org_name AS orgName, ROUND(IFNULL(sd.totalSeconds, 0) / 3600.0, 2) AS totalStudyHours, IFNULL(ec.cnt, 0) AS enrollCount, IFNULL(sd.completed, 0) AS completedChapters, IFNULL(ea.examCount, 0) AS examCount, IFNULL(ea.avgScore, 0) AS examAvgScore, IFNULL(cc.cnt, 0) AS consultCount FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN ( SELECT student_id, SUM(study_duration) AS totalSeconds, SUM(CASE WHEN completed = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completed FROM study_record WHERE deleted = 0 GROUP BY student_id ) sd ON sd.student_id = u.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT student_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM course_enroll WHERE deleted = 0 GROUP BY student_id ) ec ON ec.student_id = u.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT student_id, COUNT(*) AS examCount, AVG(score) AS avgScore FROM exam_record WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 2 GROUP BY student_id ) ea ON ea.student_id = u.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT student_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM consult_record WHERE deleted = 0 GROUP BY student_id ) cc ON cc.student_id = u.id WHERE u.id = #{studentId} AND u.deleted = 0

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(update_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS `date`, ROUND(IFNULL(SUM(study_duration), 0) / 3600.0, 2) AS hours, ROUND(IFNULL(SUM(study_duration), 0) / 60.0, 0) AS minutes FROM study_record WHERE deleted = 0 AND student_id = #{studentId} AND update_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY `date` ORDER BY `date`
